allow: Bash(pnpm --filter @mailstash/cli exec tsx src/ingest.ts --account test --mbox test.mbox)
Bash(pnpm --filter @mailstash/cli exec tsx src/ingest.ts ingest --account test --mbox /tmp/test-mailstash.mbox --dry-run 2>&1)
Bash(echo "" | timeout 2 pnpm --filter @mailstash/cli exec tsx src/ingest.ts --mbox /tmp/test-mailstash.mbox --dry-run 2>&1 || true)
Bash(echo "" | gtimeout 2 pnpm --filter @mailstash/cli exec tsx src/ingest.ts --mbox /tmp/test-mailstash.mbox --dry-run 2>&1 || true)
Bash(echo "" | pnpm --filter @mailstash/cli exec tsx src/ingest.ts --mbox /tmp/test-mailstash.mbox --dry-run 2>&1 || true)
